title: Whitesnake Addon (Ripples of the Past)
description: An addon for Jojo mod known as "Ripples of the Past", which adds a new stand to the game.
body:
# 💿 Whitesnake Addon For Ripples of the Past

- Current version: **BETA 1.0.9**
- [Source code of the original addon](<https://github.com/ArchLunatic1057/Whitesnake-Addon-RotP>)

A good rework of Whitesnake from **JJBA Part 6: Stone Ocean**, which originally was made by **ArchLunatic** and others.

Special thanks to **TheDoGGyS** and **Weever** for helping alongside the project development!

Some SFX are made by **LAMBIRNO**, and texture of "Melt Your Heart" block by **ksadsa**. Concept of Stand by **nefarious**

# 👊 Attacks:
- Light punch
- Heavy punch (shift variation of Light punch/Punch barrage)
- Punch barrage
- Disc throw

# ✨️ Abilities:
- Memory disc ejection, which works both on players and mobs
- Stand disc ejection
- Blindness
- "Melt Your Heart"

## ❔ About the Memory/Stand disc mechanic:
- Memory disc mechanic grants an ability of ejecting Memory discs of any living entity. As the memory disc gets ejected from entity, it becomes immobile for fighting. Immobility spreads among all entities, players and Stands are not exception.

- In case of Stand discs, Whitesnake user decides which Stand victim will have, or will not have at all. Basically, it takes a Stand out of the victim, writing it into a Stand disc, which will also include Stand's abilities and Resolve level.

# 🎮 Showcase:
